mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id as "orderId", customer_id as "customerId", amount, currency, payment_method as "paymentMethod", gateway_transaction_id as "gatewayTransactionId", gateway_response as "gatewayResponse", retry_count as "retryCount", failure_reason as "failureReason", "stateId" as "stateId", created_time as "createdTime", last_modified_time as "lastModifiedTime" FROM payment WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT "stateId" as "stateId", COUNT(*) as "count" FROM payment GROUP BY "stateId" ORDER BY "count" DESC
SELECT count(*) FROM payment WHERE payment_method = #{paymentMethod}

SELECT id, order_id as "orderId", customer_id as "customerId", amount, currency, payment_method as "paymentMethod", "stateId" as "stateId", created_time as "createdTime" FROM payment WHERE payment_method = #{paymentMethod} ${orderby} ${pagination}
SELECT count(*) FROM payment WHERE "stateId" IN ('FAILED', 'ABANDONED')

SELECT id, order_id as "orderId", customer_id as "customerId", amount, payment_method as "paymentMethod", failure_reason as "failureReason", retry_count as "retryCount", "stateId" as "stateId", created_time as "createdTime" FROM payment WHERE "stateId" IN ('FAILED', 'ABANDONED') ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT CAST(created_time AS DATE) as "date", COUNT(*) as "transactionCount", SUM(amount) as "totalRevenue", currency FROM payment WHERE "stateId" IN ('SUCCEEDED', 'SETTLED') GROUP BY CAST(created_time AS DATE), currency ORDER BY "date" DESC
SELECT id, order_id as "orderId", amount, currency, payment_method as "paymentMethod", "stateId" as "stateId", created_time as "createdTime" FROM payment WHERE order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT id, order_id as "orderId", customer_id as "customerId", amount, currency, payment_method as "paymentMethod", gateway_transaction_id as "gatewayTransactionId", "stateId" as "stateId", created_time as "createdTime", last_modified_time as "lastModifiedTime" FROM payment WHERE id = #{id}
